marker._comment: Presence of the overlay-engine import proves both that the engine module is installed and that scripts.js is hooked. Renaming overlay-engine.js is a breaking change anyway.

replace.purpose: Static-to-EDS overlay engine (readBlockSlots, writeSlot, applySlotsToTemplate, resolveTemplateName, applyTemplateOverlay). Snowflake-owned module imported by scripts.js.
Per-template animation engine loader with HEAD-probe; templates without animations skip silently and don't pull CDN deps.
Lifecycle visibility CSS with direct-child selectors so fragment-internal .header/.footer classes are not caught by the boilerplate's descendant selectors.

Empty by design. The boilerplate's default ships Roboto @font-face rules that scripts.js loadFonts() loads on every page — that contaminates overlay pages whose source declares 'Roboto, Tahoma, ...' as a fallback chain without actually loading a webfont (source intends system Tahoma; boilerplate silently provides real Roboto). Per-template font needs belong in /styles/<template>.css.
Fetches /fragments/<template>/header.html based on main.dataset.overlay, instead of parsing DA-shape header markup.
Intentionally empty; the boilerplate's 272-line stylesheet leaked into our fetched fragments. All header styling lives in /styles/<template>.css.
Same reason as header.css — empty to prevent leakage.
Minimal head: CSP, viewport, aem.js + scripts.js + styles.css. No per-template stylesheet; the overlay engine loads /styles/<template>.css dynamically once the template name resolves.

ignorePatches.purpose: Allow per-template animation engines + vendored libs + experiments folder.

lines: # Per-template CSS is vendor — extracted verbatim from the source
# generator's inline <style>. Ignore everything in styles/ except the
ignorePatches.purpose: Skip per-template CSS files (vendored from source) and snowflake's own experiments folder.

lines: # Snowflake skill: in-progress run state (committed only on close)
gitignore.purpose: Avoid churn from mid-run state.json writes; closed runs rename to state.json.closed and commit.
